parsed_review.summary: CP00-717 (RP23 External Integrations II finance-integrations P08 workflow/permission/fixture bridge, risk B, 40 units RP23.P08.M04.S13-RP23.P08.M06.S08) is a faithful descriptor-only continuation of the established CP694-CP716 pattern and is supported for closeout. Verified read-only via Read/Grep/Glob: (1) registry.js CP717 binding and requirements match the baseline/prompt (unit_count 40, first/last unit IDs, next_pack CP00-718 / RP23.P08.M06.S09, deliverable counts impl 18 / hermes 19 / test 2 / claude_review 1, micro-title 10/22/8) and reconcile against the manifest included_units; (2) service.js/validators.js apply the shared frozen descriptor-only generators and validators, index.js re-exports all CP717 symbols; (3) model.test.js:62-64 cover CP717 binding/coverage, runtime-closed descriptor/packets (claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required=true, runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-718, hermes emits_runtime_receipt=false, claude read_only=true, handoff to CP00-718) and the latest contract projection with CP694-716 historical; (4) no-write/no-real-data boundaries hold (NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION and contract projection all runtime/write/leak flags false, no_real_data=true, descriptor_only=true, no-leak guards present); (5) authority boundary keeps Claude non-final and requires human approval for runtime opening, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false; (6) Hermes packet is descriptor_only_finance_integrations_no_write with emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, i.e. deterministic control-plane review/receipt handling only, not product runtime. The pack correctly does NOT over-claim: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status pending_review; inspection verdict PENDING_REVIEW awaiting this receipt. Review-hardening preconditions for this run are satisfied (auth preflight exit 0 with valid JSON, tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob, no forbidden tools, schema present, no pre-populated raw-output/receipt). Validation command outcomes are taken as recorded in command-evidence.json (all exit 0); they were not independently re-executed under the read-only constraint, and out-of-scope dirty files (closeout-pack-plan.json, next-pack-queue.json, workbook/*) were not attributed to this pack per changed-file-scope. No P0-P3 findings; Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not the final approval authority.
